case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY BILL HALL BAIL BONDS $2,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,730.00

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
CASH SUBSTITUTION OF SURETY BONDS. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
